synthesis.summary: DDOG surged ~31.6% on 4x normal volume with no news items supplied to explain the move. A jump of this magnitude — pushing RSI to 84 — typically requires a strong fundamental catalyst such as an earnings beat, raised guidance, or a major contract announcement, none of which appear in the available data. The move is unexplained by the provided news; options flow, a post-earnings gap, or institutional accumulation are plausible but unverifiable here.
